subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! I bear witness that thou hast attained unto the presence, that thou didst hasten when thou heardst the Call, and that thou didst turn thyself when the Sun shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی اشهد انک فزت باللقاء و اقبلت اذ سمعت الندآء و توجهت اذ اشرقت شمس
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God is its own standard, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @mindfulness; concentration; focus
